notes: Official Mount Sinai price transparency page links direct JSON MRF for The Mount Sinai Hospital, One Gustave L Levy Place, New York; accessible with browser-compatible TLS despite Akamai blocking plain curl.
Official Johns Hopkins Medicine Federal Price Transparency page directly links CSV MRF for The Johns Hopkins Hospital; MRF accessible with browser-compatible TLS.
Official Banner Health Hospital Price Transparency page directly links CSV MRF for Banner - University Medical Center Phoenix.
Dignity Health Arizona price transparency is hosted by CommonSpirit; selected St. Josephs Hospital and Medical Center Phoenix JSON MRF linked from official page.
Official CommonSpirit Baylor St. Lukes Medical Center price transparency page links JSON MRF for Baylor St. Lukes Medical Center Houston / McNair Campus.
Official UC San Diego Health standard charges page links JSON MRF for UC San Diego Medical Center; locations include Hillcrest, Jacobs, Moores, Sulpizio, and East Campus. Large file ~3GB.
Official Cedars-Sinai Price Transparency page directly links JSON MRF for Cedars-Sinai Medical Center, 8700 Beverly Blvd, Los Angeles.
